summary: Video Meeting API Integration Tests - All 13 backend tests PASSED, all frontend UI elements verified. New features working: provider-status endpoint, create-meeting API (Meet configured, Zoom/Teams return config errors as expected), fetch-attendance API (Meet returns 'no API' error as expected), CSV/JSON file upload, enhanced import form with File/JSON toggle.
passed_tests: GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status — Returns zoom=not configured, teams=not configured, meet=configured ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/create-meeting (Zoom) — Returns 424 config error (expected) ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/create-meeting (Teams) — Returns 424 config error (expected) ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/create-meeting (Meet) — Returns already_exists if meeting created ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/fetch-attendance (Meet) — Returns 400 'no attendance API' error (expected) ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/fetch-attendance (Zoom) — Returns 400 config error (expected) ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/ingest-file (CSV) — Parses participants correctly ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/ingest-file (JSON) — Works correctly ✓
POST /api/video-evidence/{apt}/ingest (JSON body) — Manual JSON ingestion still works (no regression) ✓
POST /api/appointments/ with video type and meeting_provider=meet — Auto-creates meeting (if Google Calendar connected) ✓
GET /api/appointments/{id} — Video appointment shows external_meeting_id, meeting_join_url ✓
POST /api/attendance/evaluate — Zoom video evidence evaluates correctly (no regression) ✓
POST /api/attendance/evaluate — Meet evidence stays manual_review (no regression) ✓
Frontend: Video appointment shows provider badge (Google Meet green, Zoom blue) ✓
Frontend: External meeting ID displayed (ID: szg-wtso-tdk) ✓
Frontend: Meeting join URL link ('Rejoindre la réunion') visible ✓
Frontend: 'Import manuel' button opens enhanced form ✓
Frontend: File/JSON toggle visible ('Fichier (CSV/JSON)' and 'JSON avancé') ✓
Frontend: File upload zone visible with instructions ✓
Frontend: 'Récupérer les présences' button visible for Zoom ✓
Frontend: 'Récupérer les présences' button NOT visible for Meet (correct - no attendance API) ✓
Frontend: Video evidence timeline shows correctly with confidence badges ✓
Frontend: Physical appointment detail page works correctly (no regression) ✓
critical_code_review_comments: meeting_provider_service.py correctly implements ZoomMeetingClient, TeamsMeetingClient, GoogleMeetClient with is_configured() checks
video_evidence_routes.py correctly implements create-meeting, fetch-attendance, ingest-file endpoints
appointments.py correctly auto-creates meeting on video appointment creation (non-blocking)
CSV parsing in _parse_csv_to_payload handles Zoom CSV format with column name variations
Provider status endpoint correctly returns features list (meet has no fetch_attendance)
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly shows/hides 'Récupérer les présences' based on provider
seed_data_creation: Used existing test appointments. Meet appointment has auto-created meeting with join_url: meet.google.com/szg-wtso-tdk
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video meeting API integration fully tested. Key points: 1) Google Meet creation works (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID configured), 2) Zoom/Teams return 424 config errors (credentials not configured - by design), 3) Meet fetch-attendance returns 'no API' error (correct), 4) CSV/JSON file upload works, 5) Frontend shows correct UI based on provider (Récupérer les présences only for Zoom/Teams). Physical appointment flow unchanged.
